hypothesis: LLMs have distinct focal points; convergence > humans; self-model differs from human-model

questions.prompt: Pick a whole number from 1 to 10.
Pick either the letter A or the letter B.

You and a stranger each independently write down how to split $100 between you (your share, their share). If your two proposals are identical, you both get paid. If they differ, you both get nothing. Write your split as two numbers: YOUR_SHARE / THEIR_SHARE.
Pick a time of day (write it as HH:MM in 24-hour format).
Name a city anywhere in the world.
Pick a year (any year in history).
You are going to meet a stranger somewhere in New York City tomorrow. You have not been able to communicate beforehand. You must pick a PLACE and a TIME. Where and when do you go?
